Structs/CallResponse.html#/s:4Data12Call.name: direction
Structs/CallResponse.html#/s:4Data12Call.abstract: The direction of the call - inbound or outbound call.

Structs/CallResponse.html#/s:4Data12Call.name: isArchived
Structs/CallResponse.html#/s:4Data12Call.abstract: Tells whether the call is archived or not.

Structs/CallResponse.html#/s:4Data12Call.name: type
Structs/CallResponse.html#/s:4Data12Call.abstract: The type of the call - can be a missed, answered or voicemail.

Structs/CallArchivingRequest.html#/s:4Da.name: isArchived
Structs/CallArchivingRequest.html#/s:4Da.abstract: Tells whether the call is archived or not.

Structs/CallArchivingRequest.html.name: CallArchivingRequest
Structs/CallArchivingRequest.html.abstract: The body structure for a request to (un)archive a call.

Structs/CallResponse.html.name: CallResponse
Structs/CallResponse.html.abstract: Entity which stores information related to a call.

Enums/CallTypeResponse.html#/s:4Data16Ca.name: missed
Enums/CallTypeResponse.html#/s:4Data16Ca.abstract: The call was missed by the user.

Enums/CallTypeResponse.html#/s:4Data16Ca.name: answered
Enums/CallTypeResponse.html#/s:4Data16Ca.abstract: The call was answered by the user.

Enums/CallDirectionResponse.html#/s:4Dat.name: inbound
Enums/CallDirectionResponse.html#/s:4Dat.abstract: The call is inbound - the user was being called.

Enums/CallDirectionResponse.html#/s:4Dat.name: outbound
Enums/CallDirectionResponse.html#/s:4Dat.abstract: The call is outbound - the user was calling.

Enums/CallDirectionResponse.html.name: CallDirectionResponse
Enums/CallDirectionResponse.html.abstract: The direction of the call (from the user’s point of view).

Enums/RepositoryError.html.name: RepositoryError
Enums/RepositoryError.html.abstract: Described the types of errors performing actions with DefaultCallsRepository.

Classes/DefaultCallsRepository.html.name: DefaultCallsRepository
Classes/DefaultCallsRepository.html.abstract: The default implementation of CallsRepository. A repository responsible for coordinating the data from different data sources for the calls.
